title: Dead Men Tell No Tales
writer: George Randolph Chester, Lillian Christy Chester, E.W. Hornung
actors: Catherine Calvert, Percy Marmont, Holmes Herbert
plot: Notorious pirate Joaquin Santos lives by the saying, "Dead Men Tell No Tales". He conspires with the prominent Squire Rattray to take over and plunder the Lady Jermyn, a ship carrying a considerable amount of gold, and then destro...
